name: yesid-dev
description: yesid.dev monorepo - apps/web (SvelteKit consumer) + apps/cms (Directus config). See docs/reference/WORKFLOW.md.

scripts.cms:sync:diff:op: op run --env-file=.env -- bun --cwd apps/cms run sync:diff
scripts.cms:sync:push:op: op run --env-file=.env -- bun --cwd apps/cms run sync:push
scripts.ci:tokens: bun run tokens:build && git diff --exit-code apps/web/src/lib/styles/tokens.css apps/web/src/app.css apps/web/src/lib/motion/tokens.ts DESIGN.md
